articles.title: Kalshi Referral Code SILIVE: Extended $10 NBA bonus, MLB predictions update
articles.summary: Kalshi is offering an extended $10 NBA bonus through referral code SILIVE while updating their MLB prediction markets. The promotion signals Kalshi's aggressive push to capture more sports betting volume as they compete with traditional sportsbooks for market share.

articles.title: Analysis | Taking a gamble on prediction markets
articles.summary: Another mainstream outlet is examining whether prediction markets deserve serious attention as forecasting tools. The coverage signals growing institutional curiosity about betting markets, which typically precedes either regulatory crackdowns or widespread adoption.

articles.title: Lawmakers Introduce Bipartisan Bill Banning Sports Bets on Prediction Markets
articles.summary: Congress wants to stop prediction markets from offering bets on sports outcomes, introducing legislation that would create a clear separation between political/economic forecasting and traditional gambling. The move signals lawmakers are trying to legitimize prediction markets for "serious" topics while protecting established sportsbooks from competition in their core territory.

articles.title: NBA Most Improved Player According to Kalshi Markets: Jalen Duran vs. Deni Avdija
articles.summary: Kalshi's NBA Most Improved Player markets are highlighting a tight race between Pistons center Jalen Duren and Wizards forward Deni Avdija as the season's breakout candidates. The betting action reveals how prediction markets can spot emerging talent before traditional media narratives catch up, giving sharp bettors an edge on player prop futures across sportsbooks.

articles.title: Polymarket’s Coming-Out Party in Washington Was a Disaster
articles.summary: Polymarket's first major Washington DC event to court regulators and legitimize prediction markets went sideways, likely featuring awkward exchanges between crypto-betting executives and skeptical policymakers. The fumbled debut signals that regulatory acceptance remains elusive, which could keep institutional money on the sidelines and force serious bettors to stick with overseas platforms.

articles.title: Prediction markets are seeing a political boom. Here’s what they might mean for California’s governor race
articles.summary: Prediction markets are exploding with political betting action, and California's gubernatorial race is becoming a major battleground for traders. The Golden State's massive economy and political influence means whoever wins will likely shape national policy trends, making it a goldmine for bettors who can read the tea leaves early.

articles.title: Kalshi cofounders' favorite users include 'this guy who lives in Kansas' who is their best inflation forecaster
articles.summary: Kalshi's cofounders revealed that their most accurate inflation predictor isn't a Wall Street analyst or economics PhD, but some regular guy trading from Kansas. This highlights how prediction markets can surface genuine forecasting talent from unexpected places, giving random traders the chance to outperform traditional experts who dominate financial media.
